## Summary
Briefly describe the change and why it’s useful.

## Motivation
What problem does this solve? Link issues if applicable.

## Changes
- [ ] Core logic
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Docs (README/BOOK)
- [ ] Feature flags / defaults

## Risks & Tradeoffs
Note any behavior changes, performance implications, or compatibility concerns.

## Benchmarks / Evidence (if relevant)
Numbers, configs, or links to runs.

## Checklist
- [ ] Rebased on latest upstream `main`
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy` clean (or justified)
- [ ] `cargo fmt` applied
- [ ] Added/updated docs and tests

## Friendly note
Thank you for reviewing! Open to adjustments and suggestions; happy to iterate.
